title: One Bad Apple
description: If one person dies, everyone dies.
body:
![Minecraft 1.19](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.19-blue)
![Fabric](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modloader-Fabric-9cf)
![Version 1.0](https://img.shields.io/badge/Version-1.0-release)
![CC0-1.0 License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-CC0--1.0-ff69b4)

When one player dies, everyone in the server does. A remake of my old mod.


## Config
If you check your config folder, you'll see a file called `one-bad-apple.json` and in the file, you get some options to customize the mod's behavior.

`invinciblePlayerUUID` is where you put the specific UUIDs of players you want immune. Each UUID should be within quotes and separated with commas.

`creativeModeDeath` allows you to affect players in creative mode. This is disabled by default.

`spectatorModeDeath` allows you to affect players in creative mode. This is disabled by default.


## Translations
If you want to add or correct translations, create an issue on the issue page and I will get right on it.

## License
